privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: GTimer is a fan project and does not collect any personal data.
privacy.localStorage: All settings are stored locally in your browser using localStorage. No information is sent to any server.
privacy.analytics: We use privacy-friendly analytics (Cloudflare Web Analytics) that do not use cookies or collect personal information.
privacy.contactDescription: If you have any questions, please open an issue on our GitHub repository.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.description: GTimer is an unofficial fan project. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Rockstar Games or Take-Two Interactive.
termsPage.trademarks: All trademarks, copyrights, and intellectual property belong to their respective owners.
termsPage.disclaimer: The countdown is provided as-is. While we strive for accuracy, we cannot guarantee it.

about.title: About GTA VI – Release Date & Countdown
about.description: Everything you need to know about Grand Theft Auto VI release date, platforms, and how the GTimer countdown works.
about.heading: About Grand Theft Auto VI
about.intro: Grand Theft Auto VI, developed by Rockstar Games, is the next entry in the legendary GTA series. Set in the fictional state of Leonida — home to neon-soaked Vice City and beyond — GTA VI promises the largest, most immersive open world Rockstar has ever built.
about.releaseInfo: GTA VI is scheduled to launch on November 19, 2026 on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S. A PC release is expected at a later date.
about.platformsInfo: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S. PC release to follow.
about.countdownInfo: GTimer tracks the exact time until the GTA VI release date in real-time, automatically adjusting to your timezone. The countdown updates every millisecond for precision.
about.faqA1: Grand Theft Auto VI is scheduled for release on November 19, 2026.
about.faqQ2: How long until GTA 6 is released?
about.faqA2: Use the countdown on this page to see the exact days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until the GTA VI release date.
about.faqQ3: What platforms will GTA 6 be on?
about.faqA3: GTA VI will launch on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S. A PC version has not been officially announced yet.
about.faqA4: Yes — GTimer counts down to Rockstar Games' official release date of November 19, 2026, using your device's local time for precision.
about.faqQ5: When is the next GTA 6 trailer?
about.faqA5: Rockstar Games has not announced a date for the next trailer. Stay tuned to Rockstar's official channels for updates.
about.faqQ6: Will GTA 6 have a single-player story?
about.faqA6: Yes, GTA VI is expected to feature a single-player story mode, reportedly set in Vice City and surrounding areas, with multiple protagonists.
